creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

I am unable to reproduce this and the Ports master is able to build this 
port properly.  I have heard of no bug reports from package users. 
Please submit the expansion of ``ac_dir'' that is causeing `test' to blow up. 
(or better explain why this is needed for you).  Is your /bin/sh still the 
stock one, or have you replaced it with zsh/bash/pdksh, etc?
